heading: Tenure and compensation of members
label: 4346 Tenure and compensation of members
text: Members of the Council shall serve full time and the Chairman of the Council shall be compensated at the rate provided for Level II of the Executive Schedule Pay Rates (). The other members of the Council shall be compensated at the rate provided for Level IV or the Executive Schedule Pay Rates ().5 U.S.C. 531315 U.S.C. 5315So in original. Probably should be “of”.1
